name: maze of ducts. I'm totally confused
description: I'm in a maze of ducts. I'm totally confused
hints: Duct maze dead-end loop! All horizontal directions return to this same room.
Only UP escapes this room. UP leads to duct room 8. Every other direction loops back here.
UP→room 8 (escape). N/S/E/W/D all→room 31 (self-loop). Complete dead end except UP.
notes: Duct maze dead-end. N/S/E/W/D all self-loop to room 31. Only UP→room 8 escapes.
